componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
GLOBAL SUPPORT

Provide typical support for this client. If the issue requires access to assets in DSx Client, Activation Manager, or assistance outside of typical North America Support Hours, contact team Leads for further assistance and guidance.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
TRIMECH CLOUD HOSTED SERVICE CLIENT

Client is hosting one or more server products on a TriMech serviced and hosted cloud server. Determine if support or consulting is required.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
SECURE CLIENT

This is a client with security clearance requirements. Please verify with the client if they require special accommodations BEFORE connecting on a remote session or receiving files.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
ESS CLIENT

Client is part of the ESS Program. Please respond according to the ESS SLA below. If you require assistance, handoff or the client requests an escalation or a hotfix for an issue, please contact the Support Rep shown in Salesforce.

  • Initial Response for Critical: 1 business hour and updates every day.
  • Initial Response for High: 2 business hours and updates every 3 days.
  • Initial Response for Medium: 4 business hours.
  • Initial Response for Low: 1 business day.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
ARAS CUSTOMER

This customer is an Aras customer. Please check with PLM team before giving support.

FlexiPage.masterLabel: Applications, Hardware and Enterprise - Case Record Page
